Package com.rays.service

Interface UserServiceInt

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    UserServiceImpl
    public interface UserServiceInt
extends BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>
    Service interface for User entity. Provides business logic operations for user management including authentication, registration, password management, and profile operations.
    Author:
    Aniket Rajput

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String password)
      Authenticates a user with login ID and password.
      UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String oldPassword, java.lang.String newPassword, UserContext userContext)
      Changes the user's password after validating the old password.
      UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a user by their login ID.
      UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
      Handles forgot password functionality.
      UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Registers a new user account.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.rays.common.BaseServiceInt

        add, delete, findById, findByUniqueKey, save, search, search, update

    • Method Detail

      • findByLoginId

        UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Finds a user by their login ID.
        Parameters:
        name - the login ID to search for
        userContext - the user context
        Returns:
        the user DTO if found, null otherwise

      • register

        UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto,
                 UserContext userContext)
        Registers a new user account. Sends a confirmation email upon successful registration.
        Parameters:
        dto - the user DTO to register
        userContext - the user context
        Returns:
        the registered user DTO

      • authenticate

        UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId,
                     java.lang.String password)
        Authenticates a user with login ID and password. Updates login attempt tracking and last login timestamp.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the user's login ID
        password - the user's password
        Returns:
        the authenticated user DTO, null if authentication fails

      • forgotPassword

        UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
        Handles forgot password functionality. Sends the password to the registered email address.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID for password recovery
        Returns:
        the user DTO if found, null otherwise

      • changePassword

        UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId,
                       java.lang.String oldPassword,
                       java.lang.String newPassword,
                       UserContext userContext)
        Changes the user's password after validating the old password. Sends a confirmation email upon successful password change.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the user's login ID
        oldPassword - the current password
        newPassword - the new password to set
        userContext - the user context
        Returns:
        the updated user DTO, null if old password is invalid
